rows.label: tev014801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev014801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fritz about the residents of NLA.

rows.label: tev014801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev014801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Fritz about recent developments.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Fritz how to buy equipment.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Fritz about recent developments.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Fritz about the arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Fritz if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Fritz about weapons dropped by indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Fritz about MEREDES & Co.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2051
rows.name: Ask Fritz about Candid & Credible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2052
rows.name: Ask Fritz if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2071
rows.name: Ask Fritz about the Nopon Commerce Guild.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2091
rows.name: Ask Fritz about Orphe Parfait.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL2111
rows.name: Ask Fritz about Six Stars.

rows.label: tev014801_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Fritz about recent developments.

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0001
rows.name:
The city's economy has finally
sprung to life, and customers
are swarming to Armory Alley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0002
rows.name:
I must admit, I worried about our future when
we were attacked by an unknown enemy and had
to crash-land on this dangerous world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0003
rows.name:
But humans are tenacious creatures. It's
hard not to appreciate that when you see
the level of energy on display here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0004
rows.name:
But I'd rather be a part of
this than a mere observer,
so I'd better get to work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Did you see the director
general's broadcast earlier?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Apparently they've discovered
10 new crew members![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0011
rows.name:
At this rate, the survey of Mira that's been
stalled for so long will probably be able to
resume soon. That sure was a relief to hear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0018
rows.name:
If you join BLADE, you'll be able to use the
shop terminal in Armory Alley to buy armaments
from the city's various arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0019
rows.name:
And once you acquire a Doll
license, you'll be able to buy
Dolls from there as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0020
rows.name:
When that happy day comes, I hope you'll
consider buying one of the high-quality
Dolls from my company, Sakuraba Industries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0026
rows.name:
The arms manufacturers have been asked to
prioritize new weapons development, but that
sort of work requires resources and money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0027
rows.name:
And there aren't any large investors
in NLA, so we have to seek capital and
miranium from individual BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0028
rows.name:
The amounts of investment provided by each is small,
but merge enough small streams and you end up with a
mighty river! At least, that's what we're counting on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG0029
rows.name:
If you join BLADE, I hope you'll
considering investing in your
preferred arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1001
rows.name:
Each arms manufacturer
has a corporation level.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1002
rows.name:
As that rises, they'll be
able to develop and sell
progressively better equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1003
rows.name:
...Hmm? You want to know what
makes a corporate level rise?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1004
rows.name:
Well, it's based on the degree to which you BLADEs
use a company's equipment. Using them in combat
promotes the products to a wider audience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1005
rows.name:
As a BLADE, you should battle using the equipment
of the manufacturers you wish to support. That will
cause their corporate level to gradually rise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1006
rows.name:
You can increase it much more quickly by using
the AM terminal in Armory Alley to contribute
miranium to a favored arms manufacturer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1007
rows.name:
Miranium is a valuable resource. With
plenty on hand, development can proceed
at a significantly faster pace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1012
rows.name:
Sometimes the weapons that emerge
from a fallen indigen's belly
possess strange properties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1013
rows.name:
I work in sales, not development,
so I couldn't begin to explain
the how or why of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG1014
rows.name:
But I think it has something to do with the strange
chemical reactions that go on inside their bodies that
allow indigens to shoot lasers and...things like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2001
rows.name:
At the moment, NLA hosts two arms manufacturers:
My company, Sakuraba Industries, and our
rival, the Grenada Galactic Group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2002
rows.name:
We at Sakuraba Industries pride ourselves on
making high-quality, conventional armaments
that excel at physical damage and defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2003
rows.name:
On the other hand, GGG primarily
focuses on creating armaments that
employ a special beam coating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2004
rows.name:
Obviously, I would recommend that you mainly
purchase Sakuraba products! But your safety
is, of course, always the highest priority.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2005
rows.name:
Therefore, I suggest you compare the wares of both
companies, then purchase the ones that will be most
effective against the enemies you expect to face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2010
rows.name:
They're a recently registered
start-up arms manufacturer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2011
rows.name:
They seem to be developing weaponry
that employs Growth technologies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2012
rows.name:
In fact, they're even designed
to look similar to the equipment
employed by enemy xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2013
rows.name:
Their armor seems sturdy, and has unique
attributes that weren't available on conventional
equipment. It's really quite something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2014
rows.name:
If you're interested, why not take a look
at the shop terminal in Armory Alley?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2020
rows.name:
Their weaponry uses highly advanced
electric- attribute technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2021
rows.name:
That makes them particularly effective against
fish-like piscinoid indigens who live near water,
as well as the Growth's automated weaponry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2022
rows.name:
They may be a rival, but there's no denying their
technical prowess when it comes to harnessing and
controlling extreme amounts of electricity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2023
rows.name:
I suppose we shouldn't be surprised. After all, this is
a race of xenoforms that was cruising the galaxy long
before we humans fired our first rocket into space.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2024
rows.name:
As a BLADE, you should give them a
try. I think you'll be impressed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2025
rows.name:
Do you know why destroying enemy appendages
refills your Doll's fuel supply?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2026
rows.name:
...That look on your face tells
me that you don't. And to be
honest, I don't either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2027
rows.name:
I asked a mechanic about it so that I could speak more
knowledgeably about our products, but his answer was so
technical that I couldn't understand a word of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2028
rows.name:
Maybe it's enough to just remember
that it's true: Destroying appendages
refills your fuel supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2030
rows.name:
The weapons that the Nopon Commerce
Guild deals in seem positively
adorable, but make no mistake...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2031
rows.name:
They are deadly weapons that
typically use extreme heat to
incinerate their targets into dust![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2032
rows.name:
The Nopon are so tiny, they're
often eaten by the Bias as food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2033
rows.name:
Yet if they were simply strong enough to
wield their own weapons, they could have
turned the tables on the Bias long ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2040
rows.name:
They develop high-tech weaponry that we
aren't even capable of comprehending
with our current level of technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2041
rows.name:
Their product line includes equipment developed with
advanced ether technology, as well as close-combat
weapons that deal damage with gravitational waves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2042
rows.name:
When the Orphe were imprisoned by
the Growth, they were apparently
forced to make weapons for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2043
rows.name:
And if you wield an Orphe Parfait
weapon, you'll understand why
the Growth sought them out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2049
rows.name:
Six Stars employs many skilled Larsian
artisans to make a variety of unique
arms that only they know how to craft.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2050
rows.name:
They are designed by Larsians and for
Larsians, and I'm told that they can be
somewhat challenging for mere humans to wield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2051
rows.name:
Nevertheless, the destructive power
that they unleash upon a successful
strike is truly eye-opening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2052
rows.name:
If you supplement your accuracy with
skills and battle traits, a Six Star
weapon can be a potent companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG2053
rows.name:
Incidentally, "Six Stars" is some Larsian cultural
allusion, and is not intended to imply that their
weapons are superior to Sakuraba's five-star offerings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG3001
rows.name:
You know, I haven't seen Avi
around lately. She used to be
one of my most regular customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG3002
rows.name:
It sounded like she was having
a hard time at work. Maybe she
ended up quitting her job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG3003
rows.name:
Well, whether she's started at some new job
or is just working hard hours at her old one,
I hope she's found some happiness in life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014801_MSG3004
rows.name:
It would be a shame to see all
of her hard work go unrewarded.[ST:wait ]
